tasks.label: Build damiao_h7
args: cmake -S ${workspaceFolder}/board/damiao_h7 -B ${workspaceFolder}/build/damiao_h7/Debug --preset Debug -G Ninja; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build ${workspaceFolder}/build/damiao_h7/Debug --config Debug -j ${env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS}; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Path ${workspaceFolder}/build/damiao_h7/Debug/compile_commands.json -Destination ${workspaceFolder}/build/compile_commands.json -Force; Copy-Item -Path ${workspaceFolder}/build/damiao_h7/Debug/base.elf -Destination ${workspaceFolder}/build/damiao_h7.elf -Force

tasks.label: Build dji_c
args: cmake -S ${workspaceFolder}/board/dji_c -B ${workspaceFolder}/build/dji_c/Debug --preset Debug -G Ninja; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build ${workspaceFolder}/build/dji_c/Debug --config Debug -j ${env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS}; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Path ${workspaceFolder}/build/dji_c/Debug/compile_commands.json -Destination ${workspaceFolder}/build/compile_commands.json -Force; Copy-Item -Path ${workspaceFolder}/build/dji_c/Debug/base.elf -Destination ${workspaceFolder}/build/dji_c.elf -Force
